subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 29 Aug

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Performance Dashboard (as of 27 Aug)

A/ Topline/P&L


Highlights

   1.

   [Follow-up from Chris meeting] Clarification of SIP P&L - refer to email
   sent by Faye; email title: “SIP seller P&L and EBITDA explaination_20250828”
   2.

   Topline: ADO 208k (107% RR, CB%+0.5pp MoM), ADG $2.1M (105% RR, CB%+0.5pp
   MoM).
   1.

      WH cross-selling ADG 91% RR, ADG CB% 90% RR, due to ABS missing
      target: CB choice ADO outperformed with low ABS ($4), while local FBS
      missed ADO target with high ABS ($10).
      3.

   Seller/standalone P&L: $275k, +$752k vs target, +$193k MoM.
   1.

      CNSIP seller P&L -$28,256 vs target, -$17,012 vs Jul, due to
      new-to-market 3-month commission waiver higher than expected due
to topline
      outperformance; commission waiver booked as cost in CNSIP seller P&L
      (instead of foregone revenue in MP PC2) due to ops challenge to
set waiver
      for large amount of CNSIP shops in the system
      2.

      Revise seller/standalone P&L target to breakeven from Sep-25 onwards



As-is (till Aug-25)

To-be (Sep-25 onwards)

Local SIP

Overall: breakeven except MYSG

MYSG: -3%

MYTH/MYPH: breakeven

Other export market each: breakeven

(Change: MYSG to breakeven)

Overall: breakeven

Each export market: breakeven

CNSIP

Overall: breakeven

SEA+TW overall: breakeven

BR/CO/CL/MX each: breakeven

(No change)

Overall: breakeven

SEA+TW overall: breakeven

BR/CO/CL/MX each: breakeven


   4.

   Combined PC2 at Shopee level: $4.81M, +$1.13M vs target, +$0.60M MoM.
   1.

      Local SIP MP PC2 -$40,943 vs target, due to paid ads underspending
      leading to lower MP ads revenue


B/ Regional direct selling (as of 29 Aug)

Highlights

   1.

   Overall ADO/ADG/seller/SKU 98%/95%/125%/137% RR; next step regional
   priority to 1) complete R1 mass pitching to all target sellers; 2) support
   top 100 local seller acqui
